title: Fig. 2 in A New Record of Paramblynotus magnatus (Hymenoptera: Liopteridae) from Japan, with Biological Notes on its Potential Host Association
author: Hounkpatin, Hilda
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 2. External morphology of Paramblynotus magnatus used for DNA extraction (scale bar=1 mm). A, Head and mesosoma, dorsal view; B, Head, front view; C, Head and mesosoma, lateral view; D, Left wings; E, Metasoma, lateral view.
